title: Multiome protocol - Stanford TMC
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cfg8r","text":"Overview of protocol followed for multiome (RNA-seq \u0026 ATAC-seq) experiments on intestinal samples at Stanford TMC, as part of the Human Biomolecular Atlas Program.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":130,"length":32}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"0DD07AAB9FB9465DAFEFA28C8AD58574","url":"https://hubmapconsortium.org"}}}}
steps: Isolate nuclei from frozen tissues and prepare for ATAC-seq following the Omni-ATAC protocol described by Corces et al.: Link The original protocol (without the nuclei extraction from frozen tissues portion) is described in more detail here: Link
CG000338_ChromiumNextGEM_Multiome_ATAC_GEX_User_Guide_RevG.pdf Follow the 10x Genomics protocol for Single Cell Multiome ATAC + Gene Expression from a dissociated sample: Link
creator: Thomas Karathanos
